identity: Human female cleric, young adult, soft-featured face, warm brown eyes, chestnut-brown hair peeking out from beneath a white hood.
outfit: White hooded robe with gold-trim borders, white shoulder cape, a wooden cross-shaped holy symbol on a necklace over the chest.
weapons: A gray iron spiked mace held upright in the left hand, dark wooden haft with a simple golden pommel.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-swing horizontal mace strike at chest height with the left hand, right hand raised with a soft white glow, robe swirling.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised in front of the chest, a soft golden healing light between the palms, mace lowered at her side.
blockStyle: East-facing. Mace held horizontally in both hands across the torso, hood up, chin down.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, head bowed in prayer, mace laid on the ground in front of her, robe pooled around her.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Mace held point-up in the left hand at her side, right hand resting on the holy symbol at her chest.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. White hood, chestnut hair, warm face, white gold-trimmed robe, wooden cross holy symbol on the chest, spiked mace visible in the left hand at her shoulder.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female cleric, young adult, soft-featured face, warm brown eyes, chestnut-brown hair peeking out from beneath a white hood.

OUTFIT: White hooded robe with gold-trim borders, white shoulder cape, a wooden cross-shaped holy symbol on a necklace over the chest.

WEAPONS: A gray iron spiked mace held upright in the left hand, dark wooden haft with a simple golden pommel.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female cleric, young adult, soft-featured face, warm brown eyes, chestnut-brown hair peeking out from beneath a white hood.

OUTFIT: White hooded robe with gold-trim borders, white shoulder cape, a wooden cross-shaped holy symbol on a necklace over the chest.

WEAPONS: A gray iron spiked mace held upright in the left hand, dark wooden haft with a simple golden pommel.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. White hood, chestnut hair, warm face, white gold-trimmed robe, wooden cross holy symbol on the chest, spiked mace visible in the left hand at her shoulder.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
